markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content feedback, imagery, and the new website's blog features.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Imagery Feedback:** Vizcom's Senior Designer, Mara, will review three featured image styles (HTML, texture, illustration) and NanoBanana-generated infographics in a Figma file to ensure brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:** Jordan's feedback on the "Granola" draft is live; feedback on four other drafts is pending. Aida's team is producing five new drafts this week.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**New CMS:** The new blog, launching Dec 15, supports standard features (authors, tags) and will provide reusable CTA components to break up text. Tables require manual HTML.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The project has a buffer until the Dec 15 launch. Kimberly's last day before maternity leave is Jan 9.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Production

  - [**Feedback Process:** Vizcom can provide feedback in any format (Google Doc, audio, Loom).](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Draft Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**"Granola" Draft:** Feedback from Jordan is live.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**4 Other Drafts:** Feedback is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**5 New Drafts:** In production this week; will incorporate feedback from the other drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Imagery & Infographics

  - [**Featured Images:** Aida's team created three styles using Vizcom's brand guidelines:](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [HTML-based](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Texture-based](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Illustration-based](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Infographics:** Generated via NanoBanana, these visuals represent processes described in the articles (e.g., "rapid prototyping").](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [**Vizcom Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Reviewer:** Mara (Senior Branding Web Designer) will provide final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Direction:** Avoid overly "playful" illustrations, especially of people. Objects are preferred.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Action:** Aida's designer, Katya, will upload all image options to a Figma file for Mara's review.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### New Website & CMS

  - [**Launch Date:** The new website and blog launch on **December 15**.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**CMS Access:** Kimberly will provide the staging link and login credentials today.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Blog Layout:** The new design is more editorial, with standard features like author profiles, tags, and OG images.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**CMS Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**Tables:** Not natively supported; requires manual HTML code blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**CTAs:** Reusable components will be provided (e.g., email capture, banners) to improve engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [Have Katya upload all image options to a Figma file for Mara's review.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Deliver five new content drafts this week.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**Kimberly:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Send the staging link and CMS login credentials to Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Provide reusable CTA components (code and component formats).](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Vizcom Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the four pending drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Have Mara review the Figma file with image options.](https://fathom.video/share/7zqJvnzPqNoj_8aaGXm4qMZy-hB5PUnU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
